topThreeIssues: Selective erase at t=182 leaves four numeric write targets in center-right and top-right cluttering during proportionality close
Venn diagram at t=55 in center never erased; competes spatially with tree in left-half and joint-factoring in center-right
'Mutually exclusive' introduced at law-of-total-probability beat without definition for intro audience
dp_table draws cells dp[0]-dp[7] but only fills values through dp[5]; either fill all cells or truncate to dp[0]-dp[5]
dp_table drawn at 90s during memoization-complexity beat before narration introduces what a DP table is; board action runs 8-15s ahead of narration concept
'Principle of optimality' named at beat 7 (150s) but never formally defined in narration; either define explicitly or drop the name
Board clutter at t=182: highlighting elbo_diagram in center after gmm_estep/gmm_mstep written there (t=150, t=158) -- erase GMM equations first or move closing highlight to unoccupied region
GMM beat density: t=148 introduces E-step soft-assignment AND M-step responsibility-weighted mean in single 20s beat -- split into two beats
ELBO staircase rung conflation: covers both geometric intuition and algebraic derivation; separate into two rungs
Beat at t=58 is overloaded for intro learner (thinned network + inverted dropout + 1/(1-p) formula in <30s); split into two beats
Two terms used without definition for intro audience: 'intractable' (t=138) and 'geometric mean' (t=158); define inline or simplify
'center' region assigned to both inverted_dropout_formula (t=58) and scale_reason (t=80) without sub-positioning; risk of overlap

Board clutter from never erasing data_cloud before drawing centered_cloud in same region, plus late erase of gradient_eq after narration ends -- explicit erase of data_cloud at t=19 and earlier gradient_eq erase would help
Staircase is missing micro-rung between covariance matrix and quadratic form: u^T x_i projection is not surfaced explicitly
28-second closing segment (t=232-260) has board-only actions with no narration -- ending feels padded; add closing narration beat tying eigenvector equation back to original question
